prompt: Which vulnerability is most likely present in this code?
explanation: Untrusted XML is parsed with DTD/external-entity processing left enabled, so a `<!ENTITY ... SYSTEM 'file:///etc/passwd'>` payload makes the parser read local files or fetch URLs — XML External Entity injection (CWE-611). SSRF can be a *consequence* of XXE, but the root weakness is the unsafe XML parser. Fix: disable DTDs and external entities on the factory.
